calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-04-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:51am
Judge Pro Tem Bruce Lubarsky, clerk Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Allied Business, appears through attorney Nancy Sullivan Walter, also appearing is Evelyn Pokez, President of Allied Business and employee Noel Gazo. Respondents, Vincent Blaskovich and Paul Quin appear in pro per
Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Lubarsky.

EXHR (B) Folder of documents from companies regarding the worth of the vehicle; Carfax, etc
EXHR (C) Folder containing request for damages
